detailedDescription: The Western Digital Red 256GB 5400RPM HDD provides reliable bulk storage with 175MB/s transfer speeds. Featuring 256MB cache and advanced formatting technology, this drive is ideal for desktop PCs, NAS systems, and backup solutions.
additionalSpecs: 256GB Capacity | 5400RPM | 256MB Cache | SATA 6Gb/s Interface | 175MB/s Transfer Speed | 2M Hours MTBF | Acoustic Magic Technology
